records.question: Which parties have addresses located exactly in Colorado?
records.gold_sql:
SELECT parties.party_id FROM parties
JOIN party_addresses ON parties.party_id = party_addresses.party_id
JOIN addresses ON party_addresses.address_id = addresses.address_id
WHERE addresses.state_province_county = 'Colorado'
records.pred_sql:
SELECT p.party_id
FROM parties p
JOIN party_addresses pa ON p.party_id = pa.party_id
JOIN addresses a ON pa.address_id = a.address_id
WHERE a.state_province_county = 'Colorado'
GROUP BY p.party_id
HAVING COUNT(pa.party_id) > 0

records.question: Who are the parties with the email alanna.boehm@example.net and phone 529-074-5348 that use Cheque as their payment method and have a Residence address valid since at least 2016-05-24 08:11:04 and ending exactly on 2018-03-04 08:34:45?
records.gold_sql:
SELECT parties.party_id FROM parties
JOIN party_addresses ON parties.party_id = party_addresses.party_id
WHERE party_addresses.date_address_from >= '2016-05-24 08:11:04' AND parties.party_email = 'alanna.boehm@example.net' AND party_addresses.address_type_code = 'Residence' AND party_addresses.date_address_to = '2018-03-04 08:34:45' AND parties.payment_method_code = 'Cheque' AND parties.party_phone = '529-074-5348'
records.pred_sql:
SELECT parties.party_id
FROM Parties
INNER JOIN Party_Addresses ON Parties.party_id = Party_Addresses.party_id
WHERE Parties.party_email = 'alanna.boehm@example.net'
AND Parties.payment_method_code = 'Cheque'
AND Parties.party_phone = '529-074-5348'
AND Party_Addresses.date_address_from >= '2016-05-24 08:11:04'
AND Party_Addresses.address_type_code = 'Residence'
AND Party_Addresses.date_address_to = '2018-03-04 08:34:45'

records.question: Which parties have the email exactly alanna.boehm@example.net and are linked to both addresses and forms?
records.gold_sql:
SELECT parties.party_id FROM parties
JOIN party_addresses ON parties.party_id = party_addresses.party_id
JOIN party_forms ON parties.party_id = party_forms.party_id
WHERE parties.party_email = 'alanna.boehm@example.net'
records.pred_sql:
SELECT parties.party_id
FROM Parties
WHERE parties.party_email = 'alanna.boehm@example.net'
AND EXISTS (
    SELECT 1
    FROM Party_Addresses
    WHERE Party_Addresses.party_id = Parties.party_id
)
AND EXISTS (
    SELECT 1
    FROM Party_Forms
    WHERE Party_Forms.party_id = Parties.party_id
)

records.question: Which parties use cash as their payment method, have the phone number (919)169-1514x55820 and email erick.mills@example.com, and have an address in Cletusbury, Georgia, USA from at least 2017-02-07 02:51:33 until exactly 2018-02-27 09:21:41?
records.gold_sql:
SELECT parties.party_id FROM parties
JOIN party_addresses ON parties.party_id = party_addresses.party_id
JOIN addresses ON party_addresses.address_id = addresses.address_id
WHERE parties.party_phone = '(919)169-1514x55820' AND parties.payment_method_code = 'Cash' AND parties.party_email = 'erick.mills@example.com' AND addresses.country = 'USA' AND addresses.state_province_county = 'Georgia' AND party_addresses.date_address_from >= '2017-02-07 02:51:33' AND party_addresses.date_address_to = '2018-02-27 09:21:41' AND addresses.town_city = 'Cletusbury'
records.pred_sql:
SELECT p.party_id
FROM Parties p
JOIN Party_Addresses pa ON p.party_id = pa.party_id
JOIN Addresses a ON pa.address_id = a.address_id
WHERE p.party_phone = '(919)169-1514x55820'
  AND p.payment_method_code = 'Cash'
  AND p.party_email = 'erick.mills@example.com'
  AND pa.date_address_from >= '2017-02-07 02:51:33'
  AND pa.date_address_to = '2018-02-27 09:21:41'
  AND a.country = 'USA'
  AND a.state_province_county = 'Georgia'
  AND a.town_city = 'Cletusbury'

records.question: Which parties have a payment method of Direct Debit, a phone number of 186-726-9855, forms with status Work In Progress that started no later than 2017-12-04 18:20:10 and were fully completed on or after 2018-01-31 17:09:32, and services booked by 2018-03-25 12:56:09 with a service date exactly on 2018-03-08 23:52:44?
records.gold_sql:
SELECT parties.party_id FROM parties
JOIN party_forms ON parties.party_id = party_forms.party_id
JOIN party_services ON parties.party_id = party_services.customer_id
WHERE party_forms.form_status_code = 'Work In Progress' AND parties.payment_method_code = 'Direct Debit' AND parties.party_phone = '186-726-9855' AND party_forms.date_fully_completed >= '2018-01-31 17:09:32' AND party_services.booking_made_date <= '2018-03-25 12:56:09' AND party_forms.date_completion_started <= '2017-12-04 18:20:10' AND party_services.service_datetime = '2018-03-08 23:52:44'
records.pred_sql:
SELECT p.party_id
FROM Parties p
INNER JOIN Party_Forms pf ON p.party_id = pf.party_id
INNER JOIN Party_Services ps ON p.party_id = ps.customer_id
WHERE p.payment_method_code = 'Direct Debit'
  AND p.party_phone = '186-726-9855'
  AND pf.form_status_code = 'Work In Progress'
  AND pf.date_fully_completed >= '2018-01-31 17:09:32'
  AND pf.date_completion_started <= '2017-12-04 18:20:10'
  AND ps.booking_made_date <= '2018-03-25 12:56:09'
  AND ps.service_datetime = '2018-03-08 23:52:44'

records.question: Which parties had a Residence address starting exactly on 2017-02-21 12:12:50?
records.gold_sql:
SELECT parties.party_id FROM parties
JOIN party_addresses ON parties.party_id = party_addresses.party_id
WHERE party_addresses.date_address_from = '2017-02-21 12:12:50' AND party_addresses.address_type_code = 'Residence'
records.pred_sql:
SELECT p.party_id
FROM Parties p
INNER JOIN Party_Addresses pa ON p.party_id = pa.party_id
WHERE pa.date_address_from = '2017-02-21 12:12:50' AND pa.address_type_code = 'Residence'
GROUP BY p.party_id
HAVING COUNT(pa.party_id) > 0

records.question: What parties have a payment method code of Credit Card and an email exactly daniel.charity@example.net, with form completion started on or after 2017-12-04 16:57:31?
records.gold_sql:
SELECT parties.party_id FROM parties
JOIN party_addresses ON parties.party_id = party_addresses.party_id
JOIN party_forms ON parties.party_id = party_forms.party_id
WHERE party_forms.date_completion_started >= '2017-12-04 16:57:31' AND parties.payment_method_code = 'Credit Card' AND parties.party_email = 'daniel.charity@example.net'
records.pred_sql:
SELECT p.party_id
FROM Parties p
INNER JOIN Party_Addresses pa ON p.party_id = pa.party_id
INNER JOIN Party_Forms pf ON p.party_id = pf.party_id
WHERE p.payment_method_code = 'Credit Card'
AND p.party_email = 'daniel.charity@example.net'
AND pf.date_completion_started >= '2017-12-04 16:57:31'
GROUP BY p.party_id
HAVING COUNT(pa.address_id) > 0 AND COUNT(pf.form_id) > 0
